name: Carmels
recipeInstructions:
This is a recipe for caramels. They can be soft or hard, depending on how long you cook them. My family makes them every holiday. It takes awhile but makes a lot.
Combine all ingredients in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until dissolved, stirring constantly. Continue cooking until the mixture reaches 240°F, stirring constantly. Pour into a well-buttered pan (13x18-inch cookie sheet). Let cool completely. Cut into strips and then into small pieces. Wrap each piece individually in wax paper. Store in a cool place.
These caramels can also be used in recipes such as turtle desserts.
